'''zhahala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidden|hidden]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidden|hidden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhahala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæhælæth|zhæhælæth]] || [[word:zhæhælæj|zhæhælæj]] || [[word:zhæhælæsh|zhæhælæsh]] || [[word:zhæhælæ|zhæhælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahahalath|zhahahalath]] || [[word:zhahahalaj|zhahahalaj]] || [[word:zhahahalash|zhahahalash]] || [[word:zhahahala|zhahahala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahalath|zhahalath]] || [[word:zhahalaj|zhahalaj]] || [[word:zhahalash|zhahalash]] || [[word:zhahala|zhahala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahaflath|zhahaflath]] || [[word:zhahaflaj|zhahaflaj]] || [[word:zhahaflash|zhahaflash]] || [[word:zhahaflaf|zhahaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhahalatha|zhahalatha]] || [[word:zhahalaja|zhahalaja]] || [[word:zhahalasha|zhahalasha]] || [[word:zhahalaka|zhahalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhahalath|zhahalath]] || [[word:zhahalaj|zhahalaj]] || [[word:zhahalash|zhahalash]] || [[word:zhahala|zhahala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhahalathal|zhahalathal]] || [[word:zhahalajal|zhahalajal]] || [[word:zhahalashal|zhahalashal]] || [[word:zhahalakal|zhahalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhahalathatha|zhahalathatha]] || [[word:zhahalajaja|zhahalajaja]] || [[word:zhahalashasha|zhahalashasha]] || [[word:zhahalaka|zhahalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhahalathan|zhahalathan]] || [[word:zhahalajan|zhahalajan]] || [[word:zhahalashan|zhahalashan]] || [[word:zhahalakan|zhahalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhahalathaoro|zhahalathaoro]] || [[word:zhahalajaoro|zhahalajaoro]] || [[word:zhahalashaoro|zhahalashaoro]] || [[word:zhahalakaoro|zhahalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
